title: Soybeans: one of the most influential variables for dry bulk demand
section_path: Soybeans: one of the most influential variables for dry bulk demand
section_path_text: Soybeans: one of the most influential variables for dry bulk demand
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
Soybeans have again emerged as one of the most influential variables for dry bulk demand, especially for Kamsarmax vessels that anchor the Brazil-China and US-China export corridors. Today's combination of ongoing US-China trade frictions, exceptional South American harvests, and China's unusually heavy stockpiles is subtly but materially reshaping global tonne-mile patterns. On paper, the soybean balance still looks constructive.
